books.title: Python Programming: An Introduction
books.author: John Zelle
books.subject: Programming Foundations
books.description: An introduction to computer science using the Python programming language. Perfect for complete beginners.
books.summary: This book uses Python to explain general computer programming concepts. It teaches logical thinking, building simple algorithms, and structuring code sequentially.

books.title: Python for Data Analysis
books.author: Wes McKinney
books.subject: Data Analysis
books.description: Complete guide for manipulating, processing, cleaning, and crunching datasets in Python. Written by creator of Pandas.
books.recommendedAudience: Data scientists and programmers looking to work with tabular data
books.summary: The ultimate workbook on utilizing NumPy and Pandas for modern analysis workflows. It teaches fast operations, grouping, pivoting, and preparing arrays for model training.

books.title: Hands-On Machine Learning with SciKit-Learn, Keras, and TensorFlow
books.author: Aurélien Géron
books.subject: Machine Learning
books.description: A comprehensive practical guide to building intelligent systems using Python, Scikit-learn, and neural network libraries.
books.recommendedAudience: Software engineers and analytical minds aiming to understand machine learning core theory
books.summary: This hand-on handbook leads you from simple linear models to deep multi-layer neural networks, providing complete sample code and rigorous intuitive guidelines.

books.title: Deep Learning: A Visual Approaching
books.author: Andrew Glassner
books.subject: Deep Learning
books.description: A fully visual, math-light introduction to natural networks, imagery recognition, and generative algorithms.
books.recommendedAudience: Visual learners interested in neural engines without heavy calculus
books.summary: Fills the gap between high-level summaries and dense code. Teaches neurons, convolutional kernels, embeddings, and weights through hundreds of intuitive illustrations.

books.title: Generative AI & LLMs in Action
books.author: David Clinton
books.subject: Generative AI
books.description: Learn to customize, fine-tune, select, and deploy large language models. Features prompt engineering, agentic setups, and RAG.
books.recommendedAudience: AI developers wanting to employ enterprise LLMs and generate high-fidelity text/audio assets
books.summary: Teaches context injection, vector search, guardrails, and model configuration using bleeding-edge developer APIs, frameworks, and embeddings.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.subject: Programming Foundations
books.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Teaches how to write readability, maintainable, and elegant scripts.
books.recommendedAudience: All developers regardless of stack or language
books.summary: The industry standard on architecture craftsmanship. It lists rules, bad smells, and extensive clean-ups of real codebases to turn working systems into aesthetic masterpieces.

books.title: Think Python: How to Think Like a Computer Scientist
books.author: Allen B. Downey
books.subject: Programming Foundations
books.description: An introduction to Python programming that emphasizes computational thinking and software design principles.
books.summary: Think Python emphasizes structured problem solving. It takes you on a step-by-step path from writing your first print statement to object-oriented layouts.

notifications.message: Welcome to the AI-Powered Library! Tap on Knowledge Graph to map out your study routines.
URGENT fine issued: ₹90 overdue for 'Hands-On Machine Learning'. Please resolve promptly.

learningPaths.name: Artificial Intelligence Masterclass
learningPaths.description: Embark from core programming foundations all the way to crafting Large Language Models.

steps.title: Programming Core Foundations
steps.description: Understand logic, parameters, and algorithms using introductory Python tools.

steps.title: Tabular Manipulations & Scientific Analysis
steps.description: Learn to clean, pivot, group, and visualize extensive scientific datasets with Pandas.

steps.title: Machine Learning Algorithmic Concepts
steps.description: Model linear regressions, decision trees, random forests, and gradient boosters.

steps.title: Visual Neural Network Architecture
steps.description: Build Convolutional networks, dense weights, and understand weights optimizations.

steps.title: Enterprise Generative AI & Retrieval Systems
steps.description: Deploy context-guided LLMs, leverage embeddings, vector datastores, and outline automated agents.

learningPaths.name: Software Engineering Principles
learningPaths.description: Develop coding patterns that enable team collaborations, robust codebases, and maintainable systems.

steps.title: Beginning Programmatic Habits
steps.description: Learn to write fundamental logic statements cleanly.

steps.title: Clean Code Architecture Craftsmanship
steps.description: Identify code smells, apply refactoring rules, structure tests, and separate modules elegantly.
